allow: PowerShell($libPath = \(Resolve-Path "bundle\\app\\Lib"\).Path; $env:PYTHONPATH = $libPath; .\\bundle\\python\\python.exe -c "import importlib, sys; sys.path = [r'$libPath']; mods = ['flask','flask_sqlalchemy','flask_login','werkzeug','PIL','numpy','openpyxl','cryptography','cv2','dlib','scipy','scipy.spatial','face_recognition','face_recognition_models']; [print\(f'OK  {m}' if importlib.import_module\(m\) else f'FAIL {m}'\) for m in mods]")
